sentences.text_original: 你换新电动车了？这辆真好看！
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huàn xīn diàndòngchē le? Zhè liàng zhēn hǎokàn!
sentences.text_translation: Yangi elektromoped olibsanmi? Bunisi juda chiroyli ekan!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты сменил электробайк? Этот и правда красивый!
sentences.text_translation_en: Did you get a new electric bike? This one looks really nice!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，上周买的。原来的那辆太旧了，骑起来不安全。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, shàng zhōu mǎi de. Yuánlái de nà liàng tài jiù le, qí qǐlái bù ānquán.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, o'tgan hafta oldim. Avvalgisi juda eski edi, minish xavfsiz emasdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, купил на прошлой неделе. Прежний был слишком старый, на нём небезопасно ездить.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, bought it last week. My old one was too worn out — it wasn't safe to ride.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè liàng chōngmǎn diàn néng pǎo duō yuǎn?
sentences.text_translation: Buni to'liq quvvatlasa qancha masofa yura oladi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: На полном заряде этот сколько проедет?
sentences.text_translation_en: How far can this one go on a full charge?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 大概四十公里，我上下班够用了。
sentences.pinyin: Dàgài sìshí gōnglǐ, wǒ shàngxiàbān gòu yòng le.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan qirq kilometr, ishga borib-kelishimga yetadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно сорок километров, мне на дорогу до работы и обратно хватает.
sentences.text_translation_en: About forty kilometers — that's enough for my commute.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 方便，我住一楼，直接在门口充就行。
sentences.pinyin: Fāngbiàn, wǒ zhù yī lóu, zhíjiē zài ménkǒu chōng jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Qulay, men birinchi qavatda yashayman, eshik oldida quvvatlasam bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Удобно, я живу на первом этаже, можно заряжать прямо у входа.
sentences.text_translation_en: Convenient — I live on the first floor, so I just charge it right by the door.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Chōngmǎn yí cì diàn yào duō jiǔ?
sentences.text_translation: Bir marta to'liq quvvatlash qancha vaqt oladi?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long does a full charge take?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 大概五六个小时。晚上充，早上起来就能用。
sentences.pinyin: Dàgài wǔ liù ge xiǎoshí. Wǎnshang chōng, zǎoshang qǐlái jiù néng yòng.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan besh-olti soat. Kechqurun quvvatlab qo'ysam, ertalab turib ishlataveraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно пять-шесть часов. Заряжаю вечером, а утром встал — и можно пользоваться.
sentences.text_translation_en: About five or six hours. I charge it at night, and it's ready to use in the morning.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Is this kind of bike expensive?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不贵，两千多块。比开车省钱多了。
sentences.pinyin: Bú guì, liǎng qiān duō kuài. Bǐ kāichē shěng qián duō le.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas, ikki mingdan oshadi. Mashina haydashdan ancha tejamli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Недорого, чуть больше двух тысяч. Намного экономнее, чем ездить на машине.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive, just over two thousand yuan. Much cheaper than driving a car.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān qí chē fāngbiàn ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it convenient to ride on rainy days?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不太方便，路面滑，不太安全。下雨天我一般坐地铁。
sentences.pinyin: Bú tài fāngbiàn, lùmiàn huá, bú tài ānquán. Xià yǔ tiān wǒ yìbān zuò dìtiě.
sentences.text_translation: Unchalik qulay emas, yo'l sirpanchiq, xavfsiz emas. Yomg'irli kunlari odatda metroda yuraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не очень, дорога скользкая, не совсем безопасно. В дождь я обычно езжу на метро.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not really — the road is slippery and not very safe. On rainy days I usually take the subway.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè chē xūyào shàng páizhào ma?
sentences.text_translation: Bu mashinani ro'yxatga qo'yish (raqam olish) kerakmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Этот транспорт нужно ставить на учёт?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does this bike need to be registered with a license plate?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 需要。买车的时候商家会帮你办好。
sentences.pinyin: Xūyào. Mǎi chē de shíhou shāngjiā huì bāng nǐ bàn hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Kerak. Sotib olayotganda sotuvchi sen uchun hammasini rasmiylashtirib beradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нужно. При покупке продавец всё оформит за тебя.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. When you buy it, the seller takes care of the registration for you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我以后也买一辆，上下班不用挤地铁了。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ yǐhòu yě mǎi yí liàng, shàngxiàbān búyòng jǐ dìtiě le.
sentences.text_translation: Unda men ham keyinchalik bittasini olaman, ishga borib-kelishda metroda tiqilishmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда и я потом куплю такой, чтобы не толкаться в метро по дороге на работу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll get one too — no more squeezing onto the subway for my commute.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 确实方便很多，而且还能省时间。
sentences.pinyin: Quèshí fāngbiàn hěn duō, érqiě hái néng shěng shíjiān.
sentences.text_translation: Haqiqatan ham ancha qulay, ustiga-ustak vaqtni ham tejaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Действительно намного удобнее, к тому же экономит время.
sentences.text_translation_en: It really is a lot more convenient, and it saves time too.
sentences.speaker: B
